sp_widget.description: Allows for an embedded widget and its instance options (json format) to be displayed around a flexible bootstrap panel with options for a custom title, short description, and more details link.
sp_widget.name: Embedded Widget Panel
sp_widget.template:
{{::options.title}}

{{::options.short_description}}
${Debug Mode: Embedded Widget Data Object}
{{data.embeddedWidget.data | json}}
${No widget selected to embed.}
${View more}
